mapper.select: SELECT su.id, su.username, su.password, su.password_changed, su.nickname, su.data_status, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT sd.dept_name) AS dept_names, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT sr.role_name) AS role_names, su.create_time FROM sys_user su LEFT JOIN sys_user_dept sud ON su.id = sud.user_id AND sud.enabled = '1' LEFT JOIN sys_dept sd ON sud.dept_id = sd.id AND sd.enabled = '1' AND sd.data_status = '1' LEFT JOIN sys_user_role sur ON su.id = sur.user_id AND sur.enabled = '1' LEFT JOIN sys_role sr ON sur.role_id = sr.id AND sr.enabled = '1' AND sr.data_status = '1' WHERE su.enabled = '1' AND su.id = #{userId}

SELECT su.id, su.username, su.password, su.password_changed, su.nickname, su.data_status, t1.dept_names, t2.role_names, su.create_time FROM sys_user su INNER JOIN (SELECT ta.user_id, LISTAGG(ta.dept_name, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ta.dept_name) AS dept_names FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sud.user_id, sd.dept_name FROM sys_user_dept sud INNER JOIN sys_dept sd ON sud.dept_id = sd.id AND sd.enabled = '1' AND sd.data_status = '1' WHERE sud.enabled = '1') ta GROUP BY ta.user_id) t1 ON su.id = t1.user_id INNER JOIN (SELECT ta.user_id, LISTAGG(ta.role_name, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ta.role_name) AS role_names FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sur.user_id, sr.role_name FROM sys_user_role sur INNER JOIN sys_role sr ON sur.role_id = sr.id AND sr.enabled = '1' AND sr.data_status = '1' WHERE sur.enabled = '1') ta GROUP BY ta.user_id) t2 ON su.id = t2.user_id WHERE su.enabled = '1' AND su.id = #{userId}
